gamePitch: a demo collectible TCG site with earth and water dominions for multi-site testing

world.title: The Dominions
world.description: Each realm maps to a city in the content pack — same art paths, unique names, and an independent compile output.

terra.visualIdentity: ancient stone, granite, moss, earthy greens and amber

aqua.visualIdentity: deep underwater, bioluminescence, teal and navy gothic ocean
aqua.flavorNotes: tide priests, abyss creatures, drowned hunters

designRules: Mana 1–8 (most cards 3–6). attack + health should roughly scale with mana.
Ability text must spell out keyword effects.
Use 0–2 keywords per card from the project glossary only.

image.promptGuidelines: single focal creature or character, fantasy trading card art, dramatic lighting, NO text, NO card frame, portrait 3:4
image.promptSuffix: Fantasy trading card art, detailed concept art, single focal subject, no text, no border, portrait 3:4 aspect ratio.
